name: The Blue Seats
description:
Ahh, the infamous Blue Seats.  These unrestricted stands are inhabited by
the most loyal, die-hard fans you'll ever want to not meet.  Vile, sweaty,
lewd, rude, crude, and usually drunk -- this is not the place to be for the
faint of heart.  The Blue Seats continue to the east, to the west is the exit
from WarDome.
